steps.title: Identify what x and y represent
steps.content: From the problem, $x$ is the number of hours consulting and $y$ is the number of hours drawing up plans. The total earnings are $1,258.

steps.title: Interpret the coefficients by units
steps.content: In $68x+85y=1{,}258$, each term must have units of dollars. Since $x$ is consulting hours, the coefficient $68$ is the consulting hourly rate: $68 per hour.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content: Choice A says the designer earned $68 per hour consulting, which matches the coefficient of $x$. Choice A is correct.
